mapper.select: SELECT b.board_id AS id, b.board_name AS name, b.description, b.use_yn AS isActive, COALESCE(pc.cnt, 0) AS postCount FROM tb_board b LEFT JOIN ( SELECT board_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM tb_post GROUP BY board_id ) pc ON b.board_id = pc.board_id ORDER BY b.created_date

SELECT b.board_id AS id, b.board_name AS name, b.description, b.use_yn AS isActive, COALESCE(pc.cnt, 0) AS postCount FROM tb_board b LEFT JOIN ( SELECT board_id, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM tb_post GROUP BY board_id ) pc ON b.board_id = pc.board_id WHERE b.board_id = #{boardId}
